validity_conditions.source_text: Later conflicting information can reopen the process.
validity_conditions.ambiguity: Implies that the finality of the termination is conditional on the absence of conflicting info.

body.description: Candidate states are assessed against the acquired information

representation_layer.natural_language_summary: The procedure begins when an unresolved state emerges. Candidates for this state are produced, relevant differentiating details are gathered, and the candidates are assessed against this new data. If confidence remains low, this sequence repeats. The cycle concludes once a single candidate is strongly supported or if proceeding further is deemed unjustifiable. However, if conflicting data comes to light later on, the entire evaluation process can be triggered to reopen.
representation_layer.canonical_summary: INITIATE upon unresolved state. LOOP: generate candidates, gather information, assess candidates. REPEAT loop if confidence is insufficient. TERMINATE when a candidate is supported or inquiry is unjustified. REOPEN if conflicting information occurs post-termination.

ambiguities.location: The process loops if confidence is insufficient.
ambiguities.description: The exact scope of the loop is unclear.
plausible_interpretations: The loop returns to the very first step ('Candidate states are produced') to generate alternative states.
The loop returns to the second step ('Differentiating information is acquired') to collect more data for the existing candidates.
The loop repeats both generation and acquisition steps.
ambiguities.effect_on_extraction: Affects the precise layout of the control flow mapping and AST structure.

ambiguities.location: Later conflicting information can reopen the process.
ambiguities.description: The exact point of re-entry upon reopening is unspecified.
plausible_interpretations: Reopens at the beginning as a fresh 'unresolved state'.
Reopens the evaluation phase of the previously supported candidate.
ambiguities.effect_on_extraction: Creates ambiguity regarding the target block of the transition arrow from the 'reopen' event.

notes: The text outlines a classic iterative evaluation/diagnostic model. Structural layers and conditions are mapped directly to text segments to maintain strict fidelity without extrapolation.
